subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! The letter which thou hadst written was perused. Praise be to God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه ای که بافنان مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گردید الحمدالله
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
